items.caption: A diagram illustrating the concept of numbering in organic chemistry. it shows three molecules with their atoms labeled and numbered according to the iupac rules. the substituents are highlighted in yellow, and the text above the diagram explains the method for numbering the substituents to yield the lowest possible number. the molecules are 5-bromo-2-nitrotoluene, 3-bromo-1-chlorophenol, and 2-ethyl-4-iodoaniline. the diagram is educational and serves as a visual aid for understanding the principles of organic chemistry.
